value.found_quote: Cost tracking | Spend limits, rate limits, and usage attribution | Anthropic only | [Costs](/en/costs)
value.rationale: The page explicitly lists "Cost tracking" as a usage visibility capability for Claude Code, describing it as covering "Spend limits, rate limits, and usage attribution," and links to a dedicated [Costs](/en/costs) reference page. This substantiates the claim that Claude Code offers cost tracking for monitoring spend. However, the page does not specifically mention "per-session token accounting" as described in the claim — it speaks more broadly about spend limits, rate limits, and usage attribution. The core claim of cost tracking for agent runs is supported, though the specific detail about per-session token accounting is not explicitly confirmed on this page.
